narrative:
Beavercreek 019 (precinct in Greene County) has 866 registered voters, with 46.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.8 percentage points.
